common.bookAppointmentDesc: Schedule an evaluation appointment for your child's dental health.

home.heroDescription: We protect your child's dental health with a modern pediatric dentistry approach. We are here for a fearless, painless, and fun treatment experience.
home.servicesTitle: The Best Care for Your Child
home.servicesDescription: With modern pediatric dentistry techniques and our child-friendly approach, we make every treatment safe and comfortable.
home.aboutText1: As a graduate of Marmara University Faculty of Dentistry, I decided to specialize in pediatric dentistry. I am currently pursuing my PhD in pedodontics at Yeditepe University.
home.aboutText2: My doctoral thesis focuses on child patients treated under general anesthesia. I adopt modern techniques and an empathetic approach to ensure every child's dental experience is positive and fearless.
home.ctaTitle: Take the First Step for Your Child's Dental Health
home.ctaDescription: Early interventions ensure your child has a healthy smile for life. Book an appointment now.

contact.subtitle: Contact
contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.description: Contact us for questions about your child's dental health or to request an appointment.
contact.messagePlaceholder: Your questions or notes about the treatment...

contact.errorGeneral: An error occurred. Please try again or contact us directly via email.
contact.formNote: Your appointment request will be sent to us via email. We will get back to you shortly.

errors.nameMin: Full name must be at least 2 characters.

footer.tagline: Reliable, modern, and comfortable treatment approach for your child's dental health and smile.
